page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn7i.32xlarge is an x86_64 architecture bare-metal server instance featuring 128 dedicated physical cores with single-thread execution. The system is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, providing 6.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance integrates four NVIDIA A10 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 96 GB of VRAM to accelerate parallel computing tasks.

For connectivity and storage, the ecs.ebmgn7i.32xlarge provides a baseline network bandwidth of 64 Gbps. It does not include local storage, requiring external block storage solutions for data persistence. The instance runs on a KVM hypervisor and does not include complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, this instance represents a high-density resource profile that consolidates massive CPU cores, substantial system memory, and multiple enterprise-grade GPUs into a single bare-metal node. This hardware configuration is optimized for workloads such as deep learning inference, high-performance computing, graphics rendering, and large-scale data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn7i.32xlarge is a high-performance bare-metal server built on the x86_64 architecture, featuring 128 dedicated physical cores with a single thread per core. The instance is equipped with 768.0 GB of system memory, translating to 6.0 GB of RAM per core, and integrates four NVIDIA A10 GPUs with a total of 96 GB of VRAM. Network performance is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 64 Gbps. This instance does not include local storage, necessitating network-attached storage for data persistence. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, this server offers a dense resource profile designed for parallel processing. The combination of massive CPU cores, high-capacity system memory, and dedicated GPU acceleration makes this instance highly suitable for workloads such as deep learning inference, graphics rendering, and complex scientific simulations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.ebmgn7i.32xlarge is a bare-metal server featuring 128 dedicated x86_64 cores, 768 GB RAM, and four NVIDIA A10 GPUs with 96 GB VRAM, optimized for GPU-accelerated workloads.

tagline: A dedicated bare-metal platform combining one hundred twenty-eight cores with quad graphics accelerators for demanding parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: 128 dedicated x86_64 physical cores with single-thread execution
Four integrated NVIDIA A10 GPUs providing 96 GB of total VRAM
768.0 GB of system memory delivering 6.0 GB of RAM per core
